nsave.title: Front-End Engineer (React Native)
nsave.summary: Front-end engineer and React Native developer with 4+ years building production mobile applications across healthcare, logistics, and digital product environments. Strong experience shipping cross-platform apps with JavaScript and TypeScript, integrating REST APIs, managing complex client state, and improving mobile workflows used in real operational settings. Motivated by nsave's mission and interested in building secure, reliable, and intuitive mobile experiences in a high-ownership fintech environment.

bullets: Built and maintained cross-platform React Native applications for enterprise and operational use cases, with strong focus on reliability and user-facing workflows.
Integrated REST APIs and Redux-based state management for data-heavy product flows and mobile interactions.
Improved application reliability through debugging, structured testing practices, and iterative front-end delivery.
Worked across technical and business stakeholders and mentored junior developers on maintainable front-end architecture.
